title: Conductors for Stable High-Voltage Lithium Battery
objective: Investigate conductor materials and interfacial designs that enable stable operation of high-voltage lithium battery systems.
strategic_need: Develop next-generation high-voltage lithium batteries with stable cycling for energy storage applications.
